channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ICAN Aviation Chapter to establish N500 million fund for professional development in aviation finance
item.description: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) Aviation Chapter don announce say dem wan set up one N500 million endowment fund wey go help provide steady money for research, training and ot...

item.title: Teacher dies after being accidentally hit by motorcycle while walking for exercise
item.description: A female public school teacher lost her life after being accidentally struck by a motorcycle while she was walking along a roadside as part of her regular exercise routine. The incident reportedly occ...

item.title: Ram Madhav Calls for Proactive Indian Role in Managing the Volatile Indian Ocean Region
item.description: At the 9th Indian Ocean Conference held in Mauritius, Ram Madhav, a prominent figure associated with the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh and chief of India Foundation, highlighted the growing volatility i...

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins back-to-back Masters titles, securing historic victory at Augusta
item.description: Rory McIlroy has achieved golfing history by capturing his second straight Masters championship at Augusta National, becoming the first player to do so in over two decades. The Northern Irish golfer, ...

item.title: California GOP Divided Over Governor Candidate as Swalwell Campaign Collapses
item.description: At the California Republican Party’s spring convention in San Diego, delegates found themselves energized by the spectacular downfall of Democratic gubernatorial candidate Eric Swalwell, who faces mul...

item.title: The growing crisis of Aviator betting addiction among Kenyan youth
item.description: This Nation.Africa video report explores how Aviator, a popular online betting game, has trapped many young Kenyans in a dangerous cycle of addiction and financial ruin. Through interviews with affect...

item.title: Authorities tighten Basilan port security amid manhunt for Zamboanga shooting suspects
item.description: Local authorities in Basilan have increased security measures at seaports following the fatal shooting of a Lebanese national, Fahed Hamdan, and his Filipino wife, Anora, in Zamboanga City on April 10...

item.title: Rory McIlroy's parents attend his back-to-back Masters triumph
item.description: Rory McIlroy, the two-time consecutive Masters champion, expressed his delight at having his parents present at Augusta National to witness his latest victory. A year prior, McIlroy had completed the ...

item.title: Australian Government launches fuel-saving campaign amid Middle East fuel crisis and considers budget relief
item.description: The Australian federal government is preparing additional economic support for households and businesses as global fuel prices surge due to the ongoing closure of the Strait of Hormuz caused by confli...

item.title: Kenyan Mother Leaves World Bank to Focus on Family After Reading Children’s Letters
item.description: Jane Onoka, a Kenyan mother, had built a life many would envy—a prestigious role at the World Bank, high pay, and constant travel. Yet, despite her career success, she felt empty and disconnected from...

item.title: Veteran Playback Singer Asha Bhosle Passes Away in Mumbai at 92
item.description: The nation is grieving the loss of legendary playback singer Asha Bhosle, who passed away in Mumbai on Sunday at the age of 92. Bhosle, considered one of the most iconic and versatile voices in Indian...

item.title: Weekly Fuel Price Update: Expected Rollback for April 14-20
item.description: Motorists in Metro Manila may soon benefit from lower fuel prices following several weeks of sharp increases. The Department of Energy projects that starting Tuesday, April 14, diesel prices could dro...

item.title: Government uses YouTube to tackle online misinformation and harassment
item.description: The British Government is reportedly launching a new initiative using YouTube to combat the rise of conspiracy theories and online hostility. The campaign seeks to curb misinformation circulating on t...

item.title: Traditional leaders and local groups in Kwara take bold steps to stop gender-based violence
item.description: For Kwara State, communities don begin take strong stand against gender-based violence (GBV) through proper local structures wey dey report, prevent and settle cases fairly. Brain Builders Youth Devel...

item.title: PM Modi engages women achievers ahead of upcoming women's quota bill debate
item.description: New Delhi: Ahead of Parliament's special sitting on April 16, Prime Minister Narendra Modi is actively reaching out to women achievers and eminent personalities across various sectors. The purpose is ...

item.title: Helen Zille, the DA, and the Role of the ‘Woke Left’ in South African Politics
item.description: Helen Zille’s return to the Democratic Alliance leadership has been fraught with challenges following Mmusi Maimane’s exit and the party’s poor 2019 electoral performance. The article examines Zille’s...

item.title: Péter Magyar’s Tisza Party secures landslide victory, ending Orbán’s long rule in Hungary
item.description: Hungary has entered a new political era after Péter Magyar’s Tisza Party won a decisive victory in the general election, ending Viktor Orbán’s 16-year leadership. With 98.74% of the votes counted, Tis...

item.title: Teenager Arrested for Alleged Role in Killing of Borno Brigadier General
item.description: Troops from Operation Hadin Kai don arrest one 15-year-old boy named Tijjani wey dem believe get hand for the killing of Brigadier General Oseni Braimah, commander of 29 Task Force Brigade, and three ...

item.title: Chandra Kumar Bose Alleges BJP Uses Divisive Tactics, Joins TMC
item.description: Chandra Kumar Bose, grandnephew of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose, has made some rather strong statements after formally joining the Trinamool Congress (TMC). He’s accused the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP)...

item.title: Saskatoon Tattoo Expo Showcases Global Talent and Creative Designs
item.description: Hundreds of tattoo enthusiasts came together at Prairieland Park in Saskatoon this past weekend to take part in the 2026 Saskatoon Tattoo Expo, which has quickly become one of the city’s most vibrant ...
